name: Strong but Slipping
plainEnglishDefinition: The brand remains structurally powerful, but one or more core equity inputs are losing momentum. Scale can mask weakening relevance or freshness.
triggerSummary: Large or established brand; high Demand Power or Meaningful; declining momentum on Demand Power or Meaningful; Salience may still be strong.
doctorRead: This is not a crisis diagnosis. It is an early warning that the equity base needs maintenance before the advantage leaks into demand or pricing power.
whatNotToConclude: Do not treat this as a pure awareness problem.
Do not assume the brand is weak because core levels remain strong.
Do not ignore the signal because commercial scale still looks healthy.

name: Salient but Generic
plainEnglishDefinition: The brand comes to mind, but does not have a strong enough reason to choose beyond familiarity, habit, or availability.
triggerSummary: Salience is strong or stable; Difference and Pricing Power are not ahead or are weak.
doctorRead: The brand is visible in memory, but the point of difference is not doing enough work. More reach alone may create empty awareness.
whatNotToConclude: Do not prescribe more media before checking proposition clarity.
Do not confuse fame with choice power.

name: Meaningful but Invisible
plainEnglishDefinition: Consumers who know the brand see relevance, but the brand does not come to mind often enough in relevant occasions.
triggerSummary: Meaningful is strong; Salience is weak or not ahead.
doctorRead: The brand has permission but lacks mental availability. The treatment is presence and memory structure, not necessarily repositioning.
whatNotToConclude: Do not rebuild the proposition if relevance is already strong.

name: Different but Niche
plainEnglishDefinition: The brand stands for something distinctive, but the difference is not yet broad, relevant, or easy enough to scale.
triggerSummary: Different is strong; Meaningful or Salient lag.
doctorRead: The brand has an edge. The job is to translate that edge into a broader consumer job without sanding it down.
whatNotToConclude: Do not dilute difference in pursuit of mass relevance.

name: Underbuilt Equity
plainEnglishDefinition: The brand does not yet have enough Meaningful, Different, or Salient equity to support a scaled growth role.
triggerSummary: Demand Power below ambition and M/D/S not ahead.
doctorRead: The foundation is not strong enough. Scaling media or aggressive commercial expectations before the basics are clear risks wasting investment.
whatNotToConclude: Do not label the brand as a failure without clarifying its portfolio role.
Do not jump to premium or acceleration treatments before foundation is fixed.

name: Foundation Deficit
plainEnglishDefinition: The brand is weak across most core equity measures. It needs basic brand-building foundations before targeted optimization.
triggerSummary: DP, PP, M, D, and S are all weak or category-lagging.
doctorRead: Treat the foundation before treating symptoms. This is the brand-equity version of nutrition, sleep, and exercise before specialist intervention.
whatNotToConclude: Do not over-prescribe advanced activations when the foundation is not clear.

name: Price-Value Vulnerability
plainEnglishDefinition: The brand may not have enough equity-based justification to defend or command its intended price position.
triggerSummary: Pricing Power not ahead, weak Different or Meaningful, or Pricing Power 9-box flags risk.
doctorRead: This is a broad brand-equity pricing signal, not a SKU price recommendation. The question is whether the brand earns its price in consumers’ minds.
whatNotToConclude: Do not use Pricing Power to set SKU-level price points.
Do not assume the only answer is price reduction.

name: Healthy / Monitor
plainEnglishDefinition: The brand does not trigger a major equity ailment from the current data. Continue monitoring and look for strategic upside.
doctorRead: The current panel does not demand urgent intervention. The right work is to maintain the brand’s strengths and monitor context shifts.
whatNotToConclude: Do not assume no action is needed; context and portfolio role still matter.
